lang.spell_not_available: Spell checking not available for this language

home.create_first_desc: Thesis, paper, or technical report. Start from a profile.
home.latex_missing: No LaTeX compiler installed — PDFs cannot be generated.
home.latex_install_hint: Install Tectonic, MiKTeX or TeX Live to compile.

editor.progress_title: View progress and generate a review report
editor.figure_plus_title: Insert generated figure - 38 diagram types without writing LaTeX
editor.start_writing_basic_hint: Click to add your first paragraph. You can add citations, figures, or tables later.
editor.start_writing_advanced_hint: Click here to add a paragraph, or use the toolbar above.
editor.select_section: Select a section in the outline
editor.restore_version_message: The current state will be saved automatically as a backup before restoring this version.
editor.delete_version_message: This saved version will be permanently deleted.
editor.create_one_hint: Use the field above to create one.
editor.toolbar_basic_figure_hint: Image with caption and automatic number
editor.toolbar_basic_table_hint: Table with rows, columns, and caption
editor.toolbar_basic_visual_hint: Venn, flow, molecules, circuits, Feynman, and more - no LaTeX
editor.toolbar_advanced_visual_hint: Venn, flow, chemistry, circuits, Feynman, biology, music - no LaTeX
editor.toolbar_advanced_glossary_hint: Term with definition in the glossary section
editor.toolbar_advanced_acronym_hint: Acronym with full form in the glossary
editor.meta_panel_active_hint: You are working on “{{title}}”. Write the main content, add citations when you use sources, and compile when you want to preview the document.
editor.meta_panel_default_hint: Write the main content of your work. Later you can review, compile, and export the final delivery.
editor.meta_no_committee: No committee - optional for specialty and master’s projects, recommended for doctoral and postdoctoral work.
editor.suggested_route_2: 2. Add citations, figures, or tables if needed.
editor.suggested_route_3: 3. Compile to review the PDF before delivery.

grammar.privacy_notice: Text is sent to LanguageTool servers for analysis.
grammar.guided_body: Use it to spot wording, agreement, and punctuation issues. It is helpful before delivery, but it does not replace your academic judgment or your advisor's review.
grammar.error_api: Could not connect to LanguageTool. Check your connection.

settings.title: Settings
settings.spell_not_supported: No spell checker available for this language
settings.dict_custom_empty: No words in your personal dictionary.
settings.community_subtitle: Community-contributed. Download or install in one click.
settings.community_contribute: Want to contribute a dictionary or translation? Visit the repository.
settings.projects_dir_hint: Default path where new projects will be saved.
settings.text_autocorrect_hint: Automatically fixes common mistakes on Space or Enter
settings.text_grammar_hint: Enables the grammar panel in the editor (requires internet)
settings.text_grammar_auto_hint: Sends text to LanguageTool when saving each section
settings.text_mode_basic_hint: The writing, review, and delivery tools are shown first. Technical details stay hidden until you need them.
settings.text_mode_advanced_hint: Technical controls, compilation details, and fine-grained options are shown for users who want to see the full stack.
settings.ui_scale_hint: Increases the app text without changing the PDF typography. Controls grow a little to avoid clipped text.

validation.E_MISSING_IMAGE_msg: Image '{{file}}' referenced in section '{{section}}' not found.
validation.E_MISSING_IMAGE_sug: Add the file at content/figures/{{file}} or fix the name.
validation.E_UNSAFE_FIGURE_PATH_msg: Unsafe or empty figure path '{{path}}' in section '{{section}}'.
validation.E_UNSAFE_FIGURE_PATH_sug: Use relative filenames only, without '..' or absolute paths.
validation.E_DUPLICATE_LABEL_sug: Change the label to be unique across the project.
validation.E_INVALID_CITATION_KEY_msg: Citation key '{{key}}' in section '{{section}}' is not valid for BibTeX.
validation.E_INVALID_CITATION_KEY_sug: Use only letters, digits, '_', '-', '.' and ':' with no spaces.
validation.E_CITATION_KEY_NOT_IN_BIB_msg: Citation '{{key}}' in section '{{section}}' is not in references.bib.
validation.W_MISSING_BIB_sug: Create the file with your references in BibTeX format.
validation.W_BIB_PARSE_ERROR_msg: Could not read references.bib to validate citations.
validation.W_BIB_PARSE_ERROR_sug: Check that the .bib file has valid BibTeX format.
validation.W_UNUSED_REFERENCE_msg: Reference '{{key}}' is in references.bib but not cited in the document.
validation.W_UNUSED_REFERENCE_sug: Cite the reference in the text or remove it from .bib.
validation.W_INVALID_LABEL_msg: Label '{{label}}' contains characters not allowed by LaTeX.
validation.W_INVALID_LABEL_sug: Use only letters, digits, ':', '_', '-' and '.', starting with a letter.
validation.W_UNCONFIRMED_RAW_LATEX_msg: Raw LaTeX block in section '{{section}}' is unconfirmed — will not be compiled.
validation.W_UNCONFIRMED_RAW_LATEX_sug: Confirm the block from the editor.
validation.W_PHD_NO_COMMITTEE_msg: Doctoral thesis has no committee members defined.
validation.W_PHD_NO_COMMITTEE_sug: Add jury members in the metadata panel.
validation.W_POSGRADO_NO_ABSTRACT_EN_msg: Graduate thesis has no English abstract.

document_options.title: Document options
document_options.cjk_detected: Chinese or Japanese text was detected in your document. xeCJK was enabled automatically with
document_options.cjk_change: You can change the font here.
document_options.latex_warning: This field accepts arbitrary LaTeX. An error here can prevent the document from compiling.
document_options.footer: Changes apply the next time you compile the PDF.
document_options.advanced_hint: Enable advanced mode to see fonts, operators, and extra preamble settings.

profile_status.verified_title: Matched against an official source with a verification date.
profile_status.reviewed_title: Reviewed by maintainers. Compiles and validates the base structure.
profile_status.draft_title: Under review. Some fields may be incomplete.
profile_status.experimental_title: No formal review. Useful as a starting point.
profile_status.stale_title: It was verified, but the institutional standard may have changed.
profile_status.deprecated_title: Do not use for new projects.
